'''dayosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmoeffector|osmoeffector]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmoeffector|osmoeffector]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dayosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæyesheth|dæyesheth]] || [[word:dæyeshej|dæyeshej]] || [[word:dæyeshesh|dæyeshesh]] || [[word:dæyeshe|dæyeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayoyoshoth|dayoyoshoth]] || [[word:dayoyoshoj|dayoyoshoj]] || [[word:dayoyoshosh|dayoyoshosh]] || [[word:dayoyosho|dayoyosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayoshoth|dayoshoth]] || [[word:dayoshoj|dayoshoj]] || [[word:dayoshosh|dayoshosh]] || [[word:dayosho|dayosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayofshoth|dayofshoth]] || [[word:dayofshoj|dayofshoj]] || [[word:dayofshosh|dayofshosh]] || [[word:dayofshof|dayofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dayoshotho|dayoshotho]] || [[word:dayoshojo|dayoshojo]] || [[word:dayoshosho|dayoshosho]] || [[word:dayoshoko|dayoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dayoshoth|dayoshoth]] || [[word:dayoshoj|dayoshoj]] || [[word:dayoshosh|dayoshosh]] || [[word:dayosho|dayosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dayoshothol|dayoshothol]] || [[word:dayoshojol|dayoshojol]] || [[word:dayoshoshol|dayoshoshol]] || [[word:dayoshokol|dayoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dayoshothotho|dayoshothotho]] || [[word:dayoshojojo|dayoshojojo]] || [[word:dayoshoshosho|dayoshoshosho]] || [[word:dayoshoko|dayoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dayoshothon|dayoshothon]] || [[word:dayoshojon|dayoshojon]] || [[word:dayoshoshon|dayoshoshon]] || [[word:dayoshokon|dayoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dayoshothoro|dayoshothoro]] || [[word:dayoshojoro|dayoshojoro]] || [[word:dayoshoshoro|dayoshoshoro]] || [[word:dayoshokoro|dayoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
